FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes! We offer Cash on Delivery across all major cities and towns in Pakistan. You pay only when you receive your order — no advance payment needed.
Standard delivery takes 3–7 business days after order confirmation. You will receive WhatsApp updates on your shipment status.
Yes. All medicines are prepared in-house by Hakeem Ibn Hakeem Hafiz Ali Jawad Akhtar using authentic desi herbs. Registration: QH-37949-A | PHC-NO-R53376. These are traditional Unani herbal preparations — not pharmaceutical drugs.
If you receive a damaged or incorrect item, contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos via WhatsApp. We will arrange a replacement. Opened/used products cannot be returned due to hygiene reasons.
Click any product → tap "Order Now" → you'll be redirected to WhatsApp with a pre-filled message. Just send your name, address, and product name. Our team will confirm and dispatch your order.
We deliver across Pakistan — Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Peshawar, Quetta, Okara, and all other cities. WhatsApp us if unsure about your location.
